name: Medina Sunset Walk
description: A magical evening stroll through the historic medina, ending with sunset views and dinner.
recommendation: Start in the early evening to experience the medina's vibrant energy as the sun sets. Perfect for photography and local atmosphere.

name: Historical Marrakech Tour
description: Explore the rich history and architecture of Marrakech's most iconic monuments.
recommendation: Visit in the morning when sites are less crowded and the light is ideal for photography. Wear comfortable shoes.

name: Rooftop Night Experience
description: Discover Marrakech's best rooftop bars and restaurants with views of the medina.
recommendation: Start with sunset drinks at Terrasse des Epices, then move to a more intimate rooftop bar. A polished evening route.

name: Luxury Wellness Day
description: Rejuvenate with traditional Moroccan hammams, spa treatments, and quieter garden time.
recommendation: Book spa treatments in advance. Start early with a hammam, then slow the pace with lunch and gardens.
